name: Aion Local (WSL)
description: Run the Aion web app locally inside WSL using the repo venv.

start.command: mkdir -p .drayops && PID_FILE="{{pid_file}}" && LOG_FILE="{{log_file}}" && if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ] && kill -0 "$(cat "$PID_FILE")" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Aion already running with PID $(cat "$PID_FILE")"; else env -u WERKZEUG_SERVER_FD -u WERKZEUG_RUN_MAIN -u FLASK_RUN_FROM_CLI setsid -f .venv/bin/python3 -c "from web import app; app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}, debug=False, use_reloader=False)" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 < /dev/null && sleep 1 && pgrep -f "app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}" | head -n 1 > "$PID_FILE" && echo "Started Aion with PID $(cat "$PID_FILE") on http://{{host}}:{{port}}"; fi

stop.command: PID_FILE="{{pid_file}}" && if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then kill "$(cat "$PID_FILE")" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$PID_FILE"; echo "Stopped Aion"; else pkill -f "app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "No PID file, attempted pkill"; fi

restart.command: PID_FILE="{{pid_file}}" && LOG_FILE="{{log_file}}" && if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then kill "$(cat "$PID_FILE")" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$PID_FILE"; else pkill -f "app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi && mkdir -p .drayops && env -u WERKZEUG_SERVER_FD -u WERKZEUG_RUN_MAIN -u FLASK_RUN_FROM_CLI setsid -f .venv/bin/python3 -c "from web import app; app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}, debug=False, use_reloader=False)" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 < /dev/null && sleep 1 && pgrep -f "app.run(host='{{host}}', port={{port}}" | head -n 1 > "$PID_FILE" && echo "Restarted Aion with PID $(cat "$PID_FILE") on http://{{host}}:{{port}}"
